title: Billie Jean
why_this_song: Narrative storytelling in past simple + repeated denial chorus. A2 challenge: follow a short story told in tense.

vocab_hooks.note: verb — to say something is true

grammar_callouts: past simple narration: she said, I was
'but the kid is not my son' — present simple denial

exercises.prompt_en: Fill the blank in this line:
exercises.excerpt_after: on the floor in the round?"

exercises.excerpt: She said I am the one
exercises.teacher_note: Auto-generated from synced lyrics — add the model translation when reviewing.

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:

exercises.prompt_en: "Billie Jean" was released in 1982. Do you think the themes in the song are timeless, or do they feel dated? Give one example from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: "Billie Jean" foi lançada em 1982. Você acha que os temas da música são atemporais ou já parecem datados? Dê um exemplo do que ouviu.

exercises.prompt_en: Match each English word or phrase to its Portuguese meaning.
exercises.prompt_pt: Associe cada palavra ou expressão em inglês ao significado em português.

exercises.prompt_en: Put the words in the right order:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque as palavras na ordem certa:

exercises.excerpt_after: on the floor in the round?"

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "lover" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "lover" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: She said I am the one
Just the smell of sweet perfume
But the kid is not my son

teaching_notes_md: **Pedagogy:** Classic storytelling structure — setup, conflict, denial. Pair with a creative-writing exercise: retell the story from Billie Jean's perspective.

lines: But the kid is not my son
For 40 days and for 40 nights, I was on her side
But who can stand when she's in demand? Her schemes and plans
But the kid is not my son
Billie Jean is not my lover, uh
She's just a girl who claims that I am the one (oh, baby)
